customFields.value: Met at Bostwick Cafe to discuss referral partnership. HR agency sees companies at inflection points (growth, closure, moves). Also owns Nexus for Lawyers.
Wants to break away from Verizon (2 phones + internet). Contract cancellation concerns are the barrier. Ready buyer, needs ETF solution.
Currently has Lightcurve (subsidized by City of Tacoma). Price concern — Lightcurve beats us on cost. Competitor intel play.
Bliss Law Group going out of business. Has closed location from Feb still being billed. Needs help resolving billing issue. Follow-up by Tuesday committed.
Stopped in to Tacoma Wine Merchants. Small talk about food & bev industry being down. Mentioned Cedric is a friend — she had him in their CRM. Warm reception.
